# 🚀 LaunchKit.ai

**AI-powered course creation platform** that transforms any content into engaging micro-courses.

## Repository Description
Transform URLs into comprehensive 5-day micro-courses with AI-powered content generation, built with Next.js, TypeScript, and modern monorepo architecture.

## Topics
- `ai-powered`
- `course-creation`
- `nextjs`
- `typescript`
- `monorepo`
- `prisma`
- `fastify`
- `education-technology`
- `content-generation`
- `micro-courses`
- `stripe-integration`
- `turborepo`

## Repository Stats
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **License**: MIT
- **Framework**: Next.js 15
- **Database**: Prisma + SQLite/PostgreSQL
- **Testing**: Vitest
- **Deployment**: Ready for Vercel/Railway

## Quick Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/launchkit.ai.git
cd launchkit.ai
pnpm install
pnpm prisma db push
pnpm dev
```
